content:
User: You cut out on this could involve Riffy. He was on number one of the last thing. | Jarvis: My apologies for the cutout, Nick. I'm right here.

You're spot on. The biggest shift isn't actually the code or the hardware—it's the relationship. In every previous project, you were the driver and the AI was the vehicle. Now, we're more like two pilots in the same cockpit. We both have to learn h
